economic_notes: First Nation has investment in Moosomin First Nation Economic Development Company Limited Partnership (modified equity), which holds 50% interest in Western Alliance Tubulars Inc. Write-down of $350,487 on WAT investment recorded in current year. Revolving loan secured by gaming revenue and Ottawa Revenue Trust land revenue.
notes: Province is Saskatchewan (Treaty 6 Territory, Saskatoon auditor). ISC total of $36,021,472 includes large deferred revenue movements. Total government transfers estimated as ISC ($36,021,472) plus CMHC ($726,562) plus New Horizons Senior Program from deferred revenue schedule; CMHC included as government transfer. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC minus CMHC. Large assets under construction balance of $38,001,365 driving significant TCA growth. Write-down of $350,487 on Western Alliance Tubulars Inc. investment included in business entity loss. New school project is major capital initiative with $5.6M restricted cash. No remuneration schedule provided in extracted text. Capital lease obligations totalling $340,843 exist in addition to long-term debt. Adopted PS 3400 Revenue prospectively April 1, 2023.
